title: deparia petersenii subsp. indica
intro: Deparia petersenii subsp. indica, also known as the Himalayan chain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Deparia petersenii subsp. indica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often consumed as teas, decoctions, or tinctures, and are also used topically in the form of creams or ointments to treat skin conditions.
